name: integration__this_girl_built_up_an_account_over_18_m
method:
this girl built up an account over 18 months, which now has millions of views.

then she made an app and turned it into $70k mrr.

lesson to be learned here:

social growth engineering + horizontal s

phases.name: content_generation
steps: generate 3 posts per niche from content_multiplier.py
create app-demo short clips from existing builds

phases.name: distribution
steps: reply-engage on 10 relevant threads per platform

phases.name: audience_tracking
steps: scrape follower counts and engagement metrics
compute growth rate and project milestone dates

phases.name: app_promotion_trigger
steps: when account crosses threshold, generate app-launch content burst
insert app CTA into bio and pinned post
